pages.text: The $(flesh)Primordial Cradle$() is a bowl of living flesh that you feed. In return it summons "primordial messengers" — Flesh Blobs — and through them gives you the Living Flesh the rest of the craft depends on.
pages.title: Raising the Cradle

pages.text: A Primordial Core cupped in raw meat, with a $(italic)fang$() at each upper corner. Place the finished Cradle on the ground with open space above it — it needs room to birth what it makes.

$(bold)How you feed it.$() Right-click the Cradle with an item to offer it as a $(flesh)tribute$(). The Cradle eats, makes a noise of approval or disgust, and adjusts its inner state. Drop fluids in as well — buckets and the pack's drink fluids count. When it has eaten enough, it births.$(br2)What it births — calm or hungry, ordinary or primordial, clean or diseased — is decided entirely by what you fed it. That is the subject of the next four pages.
pages.title: Feeding It
